description_long: This object is a rustic outdoor signboard supported by two vertical, weathered wooden posts. The main sign panel is rectangular, bordered in yellow, and features a dark blue background with the words 'Parque Dos Lagos' in a stylized yellow script. A simple sun and water graphic is depicted on the left side of the sign, enhancing its park or nature-themed appearance. The rear of the sign is plain and unadorned, finished in a solid yellow color. The construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor environments such as parks or nature reserves, and the materials suggest durability against the elements. The overall design is straightforward, with no visible windows, doors, or interactive components beyond the sign face.
description: A rustic wooden signboard with 'Parque Dos Lagos' in yellow script, supported by two weathered wooden posts and featuring a sun and water motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sign's text, sun and water graphic, and both supporting wooden posts.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the sign panel and the cylindrical shape of the wooden post.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain yellow back of the sign and both supporting posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wooden post and the edge of the sign panel.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the structure, front-facing, with yellow script 'Parque Dos Lagos' and sun/water graphic.
